name: waterloo-course-tools
description: Codex skills for UWaterloo Learn/Brightspace and Piazza course workflows.

interface.shortDescription: Fetch UWaterloo Learn materials and summarize Piazza course information
interface.longDescription: Reusable Codex skills for Waterloo students to sync Learn/Brightspace materials, discover external course pages, and check Piazza posts through browser-use.
defaultPrompt: Sync my UWaterloo Learn course materials.
